milestone_brief: Append spatial bbox readout to the status bar after every successful render: format as '{N_verts} vertices, {N_faces} faces · bbox ±a × ±b × ±c' using mesh.bounds [1]/[3]/[5] max-extents. Original roadmap epic panel-refresh-2026q2-e5 (UPL-13, RICE 16.0, rank 3 in final-report). XS effort (~3 lines in app.py:_render_current). AI-9: bounds read only, no processEvents() expected. AI-10: bounds read must occur after _raw_mesh is assigned, inside success branch only. AI-14: if generator raises ValueError (_raw_mesh stays None), skip bbox suffix — surface only the error message. Test strategy AI-2: pure NumPy/PyVista, call a generator directly, assert mesh.bounds format. Roadmap acceptance: status-bar string matches 'N vertices, N faces · bbox ±a × ±b × ±c' for known surfaces (e.g. Fermat quartic), error path shows only the error message, all existing tests still pass.
research_synthesis: Append ' · bbox ±a × ±b × ±c' to base_msg in app.py:_render_current using self._raw_mesh.bounds[1]/[3]/[5]. Symmetry audit: 12/13 generators sample np.linspace(-bounds, bounds, n) → exact; Hanson parametric is near-symmetric (alpha=π/4 averaging) → documented over-approximation in CONTEXT.md §4. AI-9/10/14/2: all NONE-risk. Test: pure-PyVista regression in tests/test_status_bar_bbox.py asserting bbox regex on Fermat quartic + ValueError-path generator-contract.
